title: Build a Travel Agency Page
description: A travel agency landing page for Italy-focused tours. The page introduces the destination, outlines available package types with linked list items, and showcases three top itineraries using figure elements with linked images and captions. It also demonstrates SEO best practices with a meta description tag.
objectives: Build a full HTML document with SEO meta description
Use h1 and h2 to create a clear content hierarchy
Create a linked unordered list for navigation options
Use figure, anchor, img, and figcaption together for visual content
Set target and href attributes on anchor elements correctly

files.name: index.html
files.content:
Discover Italy

Art, folklore, food, nature, and more. Choose among our wide selection of guided tours and excursions, and live an unforgettable experience exploring Italy.

Packages

We offer an extensive range of holiday solutions to accommodate the needs of all our clients. From daily excursions in the most beautiful cities, to thorough tours of hidden villages and medieval towns to discover Italy's lesser-known sides.

  • Group Travels
  • Private Tours
